COURT PRE-INSTRUCTS JURY. CLOSING ARGUMENT BY PLTF AND DEFENSE; FINAL ARGUMENT BY PLTF. COUNSEL ARGUE MOTIONS DURING NOON RECESS OUT OF PRESENCE OF JURY: PLTF MOT FOR DIRECTED VERDICT IS DENIED. DEFENSE MOT FOR NON-SUIT IS GRANTED AS TO INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL STRESS AND ASSAULT BUT DENIED AS TO CIVIL RIGHTS CAUSE OF ACTION. PLTF FILES 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO CONFORM TO PROOF. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. JURY RETIRES TO JURY ROOM TO COMMENCE DELIBERATIONS; BAILIFF SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF JURY. VERDICT NOT REACHED BY END OF AFTERNOON; JURY DELIBERATIONS CONTINUED TO 9:00AM 7-18-97. JURORS AND ALT- ERNATE JURORS TO ASSEMBLE IN COURTROOM AT 9:00AM.
